'''Martha Franklin''' is a young woman protected by [[Cassandra Webb]] from [[Ezekiel Sims]] so she can meet her destiny of becoming '''Spider-Girl'''.

==Biography==
''To be added''<ref name="MW">''[[Madame Web (film)|Madame Web]]''</ref>

==Personality==
''To be added''

== Physical Appearance ==

* Mattie starts in wearing a school uniform with a dark blazer with a patch on the chest a red-burgundy top and white collared shirt underneath while on a skateboard on the way to school.
* She would then wear sky blue track jacket with a red stripes on the sleeves paired with a white crop top to her bellybutton and dark pants with black belt.
* As Spider-Girl, Mattie Franklin’s suit was primarily blue with red accents and a red spider emblem on the chest and with red goggles on her eyes to obscure her identity.

==Powers and Abilities==
===Potential Powers===
*'''Spider Physiology''': In the future, Mattie Franklin would receive [[Spiders|spider]] powers, as seen by [[Ezekiel Sims]] and [[Madame Web]]'s [[Web of Life|visions]].
**'''Superhuman Strength''': In a potential future, Mattie was able to go toe-to-toe with a similarly enhanced Ezekiel Sims, however, when he started to overpower her, Mattie used her strength to break Sims' hold and launch herself across the room.
**'''Superhuman Agility''': ''To be added''
**'''Psychic Spider Legs''': In a potential future, Mattie possessed four, large spider legs that could retract into or extend from her back. Mattie used these legs to scale surfaces and attack assailants.
**'''Surface Adhesion''': In a potential future, Mattie was seen using her Spider Legs to adhere to the walls of Ezekiel Sims' apartment''.''

===Abilities===
''To be added''

==Equipment==
*'''[[Spider-Girl Suit]]''': A specialized blue and red suit would be created and used by Mattie Franklin to operate as the crime-fighting heroine known as Spider-Girl.

==Relationships==
{{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}}

*[[Ben Parker]]
*[[Mary Parker]]
{{Col-2}}

===Enemies===
*[[Ezekiel Sims]] † - Attempted Killer
{{Col-end}}

==Trivia==
*In the comics, Mattie Franklin is the niece of [[J. Jonah Jameson]] who became the '''Spider-Woman''' after being endowed the powers of a [[Spiders|spider]] when attending a meeting of the Gathering of Five. In the ritual, five people would receive one of the five blessings or curses associated with the Five: Power, Immortality, Knowledge, Death or Madness.
**As a result of her participation in the ritual, she was gifted with Power in the Gathering of Five.
**In the comics, '''[[Anya Corazón]]''' also takes the mantle of Spider-Girl.

==Behind the Scenes==
*[[Bethany Levy]] was a stunt double for [[Celeste O'Connor]] in the role of Spider-Girl.
